languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, вы уверены, что это хорошая идея? Я не могу позволить вам участвовать в бою насмерть... это безответственно!"
languages.translation_comment: A Rogue Trader proves his honesty to a very harsh man from the frontier world. It's going to be a tough fight

languages.text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, вы уверены, что это хорошая идея? Я не могу позволить вам участвовать в бою насмерть... это безответственно!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"
"Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"
"Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

languages.text: 「艦長様、本当にこれで良いのですか？命を賭けた戦いに参加させてはなりません…危険すぎる！」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

traits.locale_text: 「艦長様、本当にこれで良いのですか？命を賭けた戦いに参加させてはなりません…危険すぎる！」

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, pensez-vous vraiment que ce soit une bonne idée ? Je ne peux pas vous laisser participer à un combat à mort... C'est de l'inconscience ! »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, pensez-vous vraiment que ce soit une bonne idée ? Je ne peux pas vous laisser participer à un combat à mort... C'est de l'inconscience ! »

languages.text: "Lord Captain, seid Ihr sicher, das ist weise? Ich kann Euch nicht an einem Kampf auf Leben und Tod teilnehmen lassen ... Das ist leichtsinnig!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, seid Ihr sicher, das ist weise? Ich kann Euch nicht an einem Kampf auf Leben und Tod teilnehmen lassen ... Das ist leichtsinnig!"

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, bunun akıllıca olduğundan emin misiniz? Ölümüne bir dövüşte yer almanıza izin veremem... Bu pervasızlık olur!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, bunun akıllıca olduğundan emin misiniz? Ölümüne bir dövüşte yer almanıza izin veremem... Bu pervasızlık olur!"

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, ¿seguro que esto es prudente? No puedo consentir que se vea {mf|implicado|implicada} en un duelo a muerte. ¡Es una temeridad!».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, ¿seguro que esto es prudente? No puedo consentir que se vea {mf|implicado|implicada} en un duelo a muerte. ¡Es una temeridad!».

languages.text: “舰长大人，您确定这明智吗？我不能让您参与一场死斗……这太鲁莽了！”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，您确定这明智吗？我不能让您参与一场死斗……这太鲁莽了！”
